history.content:
<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, and the goal is still farther to the east. Moving forward keeps me progressing toward the goal without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead contains lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should avoid it and turn to face a safer direction first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but the left and right adjacent cells are open. Since the goal is not visible and moving forward may be risky, I should first turn to explore a safe side path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing West. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. Turning right will change my facing direction toward the open corridor and away from the dangerous cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, while the immediate left and right are safe floor tiles. Since I need to explore carefully and avoid hazards, moving forward is reasonable because there is no visible lava and it may reveal more of the map toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown from the local view, while the cells to my left and right in the current row are open. Since I need to explore safely and avoid walls, I will turn right to face an open direction before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead appears to be lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. To avoid the lava and orient toward the open path and goal, I should turn right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing south. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while the goal is visible up and to the left, but the path straight ahead is open and avoids lava. Moving forward is the safest next step and likely brings me closer to a route toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
